name: Classic Baked Pasta Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Bulk Italian sausage or lean
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare pasta according to package directions.
3. In a large bowl, combine the pasta, sausage, pasta sauce, and 2 cups of cheese. Mix well.
4. Transfer the mixture into a greased 13x9-inch baking dish; cover with foil.
5. Bake for 45 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
6. Remove the foil; top with the remaining 2 cups of cheese and parsley.
7. Bake for an additional 10 minutes or until the cheese melts.
8. Refrigerate leftovers.
